security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may alter the vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be cast without verifiable attribution.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks proper mechanisms to trace votes back to their originators.

assumptions: The governance contract does not store sufficient metadata to identify the voter.
The system is not integrated with a trusted identity provider.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust logging and audit trails for all votes.

description: An attacker may cast votes without leaving any traceable evidence of their identity.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or processing.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive vote data is transmitted over the network without sufficient encryption.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the contract is not secured.
Vote data is not adequately protected at rest.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt all vote data transmitted over the network and at rest.

description: An attacker may intercept or retrieve vote data during transmission or processing.
